    Methods in de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.metaconstruct with parameters of type EnhancedFor
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    ReplaceWhileLoop.performActionOnEnhancedFor(EnhancedFor x)
     
    void
    WhileInvariantTransformation.performActionOnEnhancedFor(EnhancedFor x)
    Transform the body of an enhanced for loop for usage with invariant-theorems.
    void
    WhileLoopTransformation.performActionOnEnhancedFor(EnhancedFor x)
    perform the loop transformation on an enhanced for loop (Java5) If the enhanced for loop is the toplevel loop nothing happens - return the loop itself, as enhanced for loops cannot be unwound, a log message is issued.

    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description

    Creates a new enhaced for-loop elimination.

    Creates a new enhaced for-loop elimination.
